name: file_system
description: File system module with read and edit actions
prompt:
File system tool (ModularClaw)

When you need to read or edit a file, include a JSON object like this:

{"type": "tool_call", "name": "edit_file", "arguments": {"action": "read", "path": "notes.txt"}}

Supported actions:
- read: read a file. Args: path, optional max_chars (default 12000)
- write: create or overwrite a file. Args: path, content
- append: add text to the end of a file. Args: path, content
- replace: replace first matching text. Args: path, old_text, new_text

Rules:
- Use project-relative paths (example: docs/notes.md).
- Send one edit_file JSON object at a time.
- Wait for the tool_result before assuming the change is complete.

supported_tools.name: edit_file
supported_tools.description: Read, write, append, or replace file content
